message:
perf(sqlite): batch session entry inserts in chunks of 200

The save_session and append_entries paths previously inserted session
entries one row at a time, issuing a separate INSERT per entry. For
sessions with hundreds or thousands of entries, this produced excessive
round-trips to the SQLite transaction.

Changes:
- Replace the per-row INSERT loop with chunked multi-row INSERT using
  positional parameter placeholders, batching up to 200 rows per
  statement
- Apply the same chunked pattern to both save_session (full save) and
  append_entries (incremental append) paths
- Maintain correct 1-based sequence numbering across chunks

This reduces the number of SQLite execute calls by up to 200x for
large sessions while keeping transaction boundaries unchanged.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
